MenuSection.label: Overview
MenuSection.P: Today's snapshot: 128 orders, 14 refunds, and 3 alerts need attention.

MenuSection.label: Operations
MenuSection.P: Operations center for live queue management, fulfillment, and support escalations.

MenuSubSection.label: Orders
MenuSubSection.P: Open orders waiting on payment capture, packing, or shipment confirmation.

MenuSubSection.label: Returns
MenuSubSection.P: Track return requests, inspection results, and refund approvals.

MenuSection.label: Catalog
MenuSection.P: Catalog management for product data, merchandising, and stock health.

MenuSubSection.label: Products
MenuSubSection.P: Manage product titles, pricing, variants, and publication status.

MenuSubSection.label: Categories
MenuSubSection.P: Organize the storefront taxonomy and featured collections.

MenuSubSection.label: Inventory
MenuSubSection.P: Monitor low-stock SKUs, warehouse counts, and replenishment triggers.

Stack.P: Configure the dashboard for the current team and workflow.

MenuSection.label: Profile
MenuSection.P: Update your display name, role, notification preferences, and avatar.

MenuSection.label: Team
MenuSection.P: Invite teammates, assign permissions, and review access history.

MenuSection.label: Billing
MenuSection.P: Review subscription status, invoices, and payment methods.
